generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motorized lighting system actuator integrated with BIM model for automated control via bidirectional communication with Ditto service platform"
]

instance HVACValve : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system valve actuator configured within BIM environment for dynamic control based on reinforcement learning policies"
]

instance MotorizedShade : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building envelope shading system actuator modeled in BIM with automated configuration for energy optimization"
]

instance SmartRelay : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled electrical relay device integrated with Ditto for automated control of building systems"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision temperature sensor deployed across building infrastructure capturing real-time environmental conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance RelativeHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor network integrated with Hono for real-time moisture level monitoring in building spaces"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RelativeHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy-aware daylight sensor system providing real-time illumination data for adaptive lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sub-metering system capturing real-time energy consumption data at component level for building analytics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "PIR-based occupancy detection system providing real-time occupancy patterns for space utilization analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor
]

instance RelativeHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RelativeHumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance DeviceConfigurationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BIMDeviceModeler
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMCoreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic-rich 3D representation in IFC format containing building geometry, topology, and component relationships enriched with DT-specific metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToM2MTransformer, BIMToM2TTransformer
]

instance RuntimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series database storing real-time sensor readings, control signals, and operational metrics ingested via Hono/Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted, RelativeHumidityDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoServicePlatform, ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific configuration models for lighting schedules, HVAC setpoints, and adaptive control policies embedded in BIM and transformed to runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo M2MTransformationPipeline
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 assets providing interactive 3D rendering of building infrastructure with real-time data visualization capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance ServiceModelRegistry : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Ditto service registry containing customizable service definitions for AI models, optimization algorithms, and extension points"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoServicePlatform
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MDE platform automating BIM-to-runtime transformations using model-to-model (M2M) and model-to-text (M2T) techniques"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMToM2MTransformer, BIMToM2TTransformer, M2MTransformationPipeline
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT middleware providing secure, scalable data ingestion from heterogeneous sensors with standardized MQTT protocol support"
    DTDFVocab:enables SensorDataIngestion, DeviceConfigurationIngestion
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service-oriented platform enabling bidirectional communication, device management, and service orchestration for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables DittoServicePlatform, DeviceConfigurationDistribution, ControlSignalDistribution
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-fidelity 3D visualization engine providing immersive interactive simulation environment for DT monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables UnrealEngineVisualization, InteractiveMonitoring
]

instance BIMTooling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Industry-standard BIM software (Revit/ArchiCAD) for modeling and enriching assets with DT-specific metadata"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMDeviceModeler, BIMModelEnrichment
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS-based adaptive control system optimizing energy efficiency and occupant comfort through machine learning"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlPolicies
]

instance M2MTransformationPipeline : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model transformation pipeline converting BIM models to runtime artifacts for Ditto and control systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables DittoDeviceConfiguration
]

instance DittoServicePlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service-oriented architecture enabling modular service integration and extension points for custom DT services"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, AutomatedCommissioningService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D visualization of operational data including energy consumption and environmental metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDashboardInsight, OccupancyVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing building operations through reinforcement learning-based energy-efficient lighting and adaptive HVAC control"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendation, FaultDetectionAlert
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling bidirectional synchronization between BIM models and physical devices for seamless control system integration"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceConfigurationValidation, ControlLogicSynchronization
]

instance ServiceOrientedExtensibilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing standardized extension points for integrating custom services like AI-driven fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceIntegration
]

instance RuntimeConfigurationManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling dynamic adjustment of DT parameters without full redeployment"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdate
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D dashboard showing real-time energy consumption metrics and environmental conditions"
]

instance OccupancyVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of occupancy patterns across building spaces for space utilization analysis"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "AI-generated suggestions for improving energy efficiency through adaptive lighting schedules"
]

instance FaultDetectionAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts based on sensor anomaly detection for potential equipment failures"
]

instance DeviceConfigurationValidation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated validation of device configurations against BIM model specifications"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlLogicSynchronization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bidirectional synchronization of control logic between BIM models and physical devices"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Integration of third-party services through standardized Ditto service APIs"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ParameterUpdate : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of DT parameters including sensor thresholds and control policies"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Components
instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized control infrastructure integrating lighting, HVAC, and envelope systems with DT for automated management"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance SensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Heterogeneous IoT sensor network providing real-time operational data across building infrastructure"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance VisualizationEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5-based 3D environment enabling immersive interaction with DT data"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance ControlLogicFramework : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Domain-specific control logic framework implementing adaptive policies for building systems"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

// C13: Environments
instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BuildingControlSystem, SensorNetwork, VisualizationEnvironment, ControlLogicFramework
]

// Additional Components for Architecture
instance BIMDeviceModeler : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "BIM-based device modeling component that enriches BIM assets with sensor/actuator metadata for automated DT configuration"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DeviceConfigurationDataTransmitted
]

instance BIMToM2MTransformer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-to-model transformation engine converting BIM models to intermediate representation for Ditto"
]

instance BIMToM2TTransformer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-to-text transformation engine generating configuration files for physical devices from BIM"
]

instance DittoDeviceConfiguration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing device configurations in Ditto platform based on transformed BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceConfigurationValidation
]

instance ControlSignalDistribution : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service enabling distribution of control signals from Ditto to physical actuators"
]

instance SensorDataIngestion : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Hono-based data ingestion pipeline processing sensor data streams"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDashboardInsight
]

instance DeviceConfigurationIngestion : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Hono-based pipeline for ingesting device configuration data from BIM"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceConfigurationValidation
]

instance DeviceConfigurationDistribution : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service enabling distribution of device configuration data to physical devices"
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service rendering 3D visualization of DT data in Unreal Engine 5 environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDashboardInsight, OccupancyVisualizationInsight
]

instance InteractiveMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling user interaction with DT visualization for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdate
]

instance BIMModelEnrichment : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service adding DT-specific metadata to BIM models for enhanced functionality"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceConfigurationValidation
]

instance AdaptiveControlPolicies : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing reinforcement learning-based adaptive control policies"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendation
]

instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Building Information Model (BIM)-based Digital Twin for infrastructure in the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is achieved through **control logic embedded in the DT**, which generates actionable commands (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) based on real-time analytics, predictive models, or user inputs. These commands are transmitted back to the physical system via Ditto’s **bidirectional API**, enabling the DT to act as a **virtual control hub**. The framework supports **real-time feedback loops**, where the DT dynamically adjusts control parameters (e.g., adaptive lighting policies) in response to operational data, closing the loop between virtual and physical systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale ranges from **millisecond-level synchronization** for critical control loops (e.g., HVAC actuators) to **second-to-minute intervals** for monitoring and analytics (e.g., energy consumption trends). The framework supports **real-time updates** (≤1 second latency) for sensor data ingestion and control command execution, while higher-level services (e.g., predictive modeling) operate on aggregated data with **minute-to-hourly time granularity**. The Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric is used to evaluate the fidelity of synchronization between the PT and DT over time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Backbone**: Central semantic foundation for device modeling and control logic.
   - **IoT Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange and device management.
   - **Control Engine**: Executes runtime policies (e.g., adaptive lighting) based on operational data.
   - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for immersive interaction with the DT.
   - **Extension Points**: Standardized APIs for integrating custom services (e.g., analytics, AI-driven diagnostics) developed by DT Engineers. The constellation ensures **scalability** by decoupling core DT functionalities from modular extensions."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all life cycle stages** of the building infrastructure, from **design (as-designed)** to **construction (as-manufactured)** and **operation (as-operated)**. Key phases include:
   - **Design Phase**: BIM models are enriched with device configurations and control logic for DT deployment.
   - **Construction Phase**: Physical sensors/actuators are commissioned and integrated into the DT via automated workflows.
   - **Operation Phase**: The DT enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control** throughout the building’s occupancy.
   - **Refurbishment/Adaptation**: The DT supports **dynamic reconfiguration** of models and services to accommodate structural or functional changes. The framework ensures **long-term compatibility** with evolving AECO standards and technologies."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Model Validation**: BIM models are validated for consistency and completeness before deployment (e.g., checking for missing device configurations).
   - **Real-Time Synchronization**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto enforce **low-latency data exchange** with millisecond-level precision for critical control loops.
   - **ODTE Metric**: Quantifies the **entanglement** between the PT and DT, measuring alignment across geometric, functional, and operational dimensions.
   - **Uncertainty Handling**: The framework accounts for **sensor noise, communication delays, and model drift** via adaptive control policies (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS).
   - **Verification**: Custom services are tested in isolation before integration to ensure correctness and interoperability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** as the primary technical connection layer, using:
   - **MQTT Protocol**: For lightweight, publish-subscribe communication between sensors/actuators and the DT.
   - **RESTful APIs**: Ditto’s service-oriented architecture enables **bidirectional HTTP-based interactions** for control commands and data queries.
   - **WebSockets**: Real-time updates for visualization and interactive monitoring in Unreal Engine 5.
   The connection architecture supports **scalable, secure, and low-latency** communication across heterogeneous IoT devices and cloud-based DT services."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted in a **cloud-based deployment environment**, leveraging:
   - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto Cloud**: Managed middleware for IoT data ingestion and service orchestration.
   - **Unreal Engine 5 Cloud**: For scalable 3D visualization and interactive simulations.
   - **Containerized Microservices**: Ditto’s service registry enables **decentralized deployment** of custom services (e.g., AI models) in isolated containers.
   The framework supports **hybrid deployment** (on-premise/cloud) to accommodate data sovereignty and latency requirements."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports horizontal integration with:
   - **External IoT Platforms**: Compatibility with third-party IoT ecosystems via Ditto’s **open APIs**.
   - **Building Management Systems (BMS)**: Seamless interoperability with proprietary BMS solutions (e.g., Siemens Desigo, Honeywell) through standardized protocols.
   - **Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)**: Integration with ERP systems for cost modeling and asset lifecycle management.
   - **Other Digital Twins**: Potential linkage with **domain-specific DTs** (e.g., urban DTs) via Ditto’s service registry for cross-system collaboration."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are addressed through:
   - **BIM-Centric Ownership**: The building owner retains ownership of the **core BIM model** and operational data, while DT service providers may manage **derived analytics** or **custom service outputs**.
   - **Encrypted Data Transmission**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto enforce **end-to-end encryption** for IoT data in transit.
   - **Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)**: Ditto’s service registry supports **granular permissions** for stakeholders (e.g., Building Control Engineers vs. Facility Managers).
   - **GDPR Compliance**: The framework includes mechanisms for **data anonymization** and **right-to-erasure** to comply with privacy regulations."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
   - **BIM Standards**: Industry Foundation Classes (IFC) or proprietary BIM formats for semantic modeling.
   - **IoT Standards**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto comply with **OMA LWM2M** and **MQTT** for device management and data exchange.
   - **Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA)**: Ditto’s API follows **RESTful principles** and **OAS (OpenAPI Specification)** for interoperability.
   - **AECO-Specific Standards**: Alignment with **ISO 19650** for BIM collaboration and **ISO 55000** for asset management.
   - **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)**: Uses **MOF (Meta Object Facility)** and **QVT (Query/View/Transformation)** for automated model transformations."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
   - **Authentication/Authorization**: Ditto enforces **OAuth 2.0** and **JWT-based authentication** for all DT interactions.
   - **Network Isolation**: Eclipse Hono provides **sandboxed IoT device connections** to prevent lateral movement attacks.
   - **Fail-Safe Mechanisms**: The DT includes **emergency shutdown protocols** for critical control systems (e.g., HVAC) to prevent operational hazards.
   - **Cybersecurity Audits**: Regular validation of **data integrity** and **access controls** to mitigate risks of unauthorized DT manipulation.
   - **Human-in-the-Loop**: Critical operations (e.g., remote adjustments to physical systems) require **manual approval** from Facility Managers to ensure safety."
]
